notes: With-skill pass rate 96% vs baseline 15% — a +81 point improvement over iteration 1's +59.5 point delta
Eval 2 (Danger Specs) is maximally discriminating: 100% with skill vs 0% without (baseline refused to answer)
Eval 3 (Services Page) is the strongest showcase: 100% with skill vs 22% without — filter pills, CSS variables, icon imports all absent in baseline

The one failure in eval 1 (method badge colors) is a grading nuance: semantic CSS vars (--color-background-success-weakest) were used instead of literal 'Green 60' token names, but the visual result is correct
Vue 3 SFC pattern passes both configs — this is a non-discriminating assertion (tests Vue knowledge, not design system knowledge)
Icon improvements from SKILL.md update are reflected: with-skill runs correctly use PascalCase imports (AddIcon, MoreIcon, SearchIcon) while baselines use string props or Unicode
